refined_fr.refined_fr: The NGHE solution shall minimize cycle time for each phase of the load→travel→dump cycle to meet the customer-defined target.
refined_fr.rationale: Decomposing the overall cycle time KPI into sub-FRs for each phase allows targeted design parameters and clearer verification.
refined_fr.verification_idea: Measure p95 cycle time for load, travel, and dump phases separately under duty cycle and site conditions.
sub_frs: Minimize load phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize travel phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize dump phase cycle time to meet target

candidate_dps: Optimize hydraulic system and actuator response for load phase
Implement efficient path planning and vehicle control for travel phase
Automate dumping mechanism and synchronization for dump phase
selected_dp.selected_dp: Optimize hydraulic system and actuator response for load phase

potential_sources: Hydraulic optimization impacts load phase primarily
Travel and dump phases have distinct control requirements
coupling_check.notes: DPs for each phase are largely decoupled, enabling modular design.

assumptions_risks: Assumes hydraulic improvements do not negatively impact safety or other phases
Risk that optimization may increase system complexity and maintenance
selected_dp.recommended_revision: Consider integration of travel and dump phase DPs in next decomposition level for holistic cycle time optimization.

im_boundary.name: Vehicle
im_boundary.scope: Physical components responsible for hydraulic actuation and mechanical systems involved in the load phase

external_interfaces.name: Telemetry
external_interfaces.details: Send load phase performance data to NGHE Solution for monitoring and analysis

external_interfaces.name: Tasking
external_interfaces.details: Receive commands from NGHE Solution or Teleoperation modules to initiate load phase actions

module_containment_scores.notes: Vehicle module fully contains hydraulic and actuator systems; minimal diffusion expected.
NGHE Solution oversees coordination but does not physically contain load phase actuation.
Teleoperation interfaces but does not contain load phase physical systems.
Safety Services monitors but does not contain load phase actuation.

assigned_im.containment_hypothesis: Assigning load phase hydraulic optimization DP to Vehicle module ensures tight containment and clear ownership.
containment_risks: Potential interface complexity with NGHE Solution for tasking and telemetry
Risk of insufficient coordination with Safety Services for safety-critical operations
assigned_im.recommended_revision: Define clear interface protocols and safety checks between Vehicle and Safety Services modules.

fr_dp_gate.reason: FR refinement clearly decomposes cycle time KPI into manageable sub-FRs; selected DP logically addresses load phase optimization.

diffusion_risks: Telemetry and Tasking interfaces may cause diffusion if not well managed
dp_im_gate.containment_notes: Vehicle module shows strong containment for load phase DP; interface boundaries are well defined.

fr_im_gate.verification_feasibility: Verification via telemetry data and cycle time measurements is feasible at Vehicle module level.
fr_im_gate.allocation_clarity: Clear allocation of load phase DP to Vehicle module with defined external interfaces.

recommended_revisions: Enhance interface definitions between Vehicle and Safety Services for safety-critical monitoring.
Plan next level decomposition for travel and dump phases.

decision.justification: While load phase DP and IM assignment are sound, the overall cycle time KPI requires parallel decomposition of travel and dump phases to fully address the FR.
next_level_sub_frs: Minimize travel phase cycle time to meet target
Minimize dump phase cycle time to meet target

revise.why: To include parallel sub-FRs for travel and dump phases for comprehensive cycle time coverage.

assumptions: Load phase optimization can be isolated for initial DP and IM assignment.
Safety Services module will be integrated for safety monitoring in subsequent levels.
open_risks: Potential interface complexity and diffusion via Telemetry and Tasking.
Safety criticality requires rigorous interface and operational policy adherence.
evidence_needed: Cycle time measurements per phase under operational conditions.
Interface performance and safety compliance test results.
